## reviewProjectDescriptor variable

Centralized descriptor for the `review` command.

Drives CLI subcommand `review` and MCP tool `project_review`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript

    projectId: string;
}, ReviewResult, z.ZodObject<{
    projectId: z.ZodString;
}, "strip", z.ZodTypeAny, {
```
